name: Update eco news with invalid data -- @1.1
fullName: Update Eco News: Update eco news with invalid data

steps.name: When I send PUT request to update eco news with id 32 and {"id":"32","source":"https://example.org","shortInfo":"Climate change update","tags":["not","not"],"title":"Climate change update","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Climate News","languageCode":"not"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Full article text here","languageCode":"not"}}:
Update eco new with specified data

parameters.name: files
parameters.value: {'image': ('image.jpg', <_io.BufferedReader name='/tmp/tmp_e3hv4br.jpg'>, 'image/jpeg'), 'updateEcoNewsDto': (None, '{"id": "32", "source": "https://example.org", "shortInfo": "Climate change update", "tags": ["not", "not"], "title": "Climate change update", "content": "Full article text here", "titleTranslation": {"content": "Climate News", "languageCode": "not"}, "textTranslation": {"content": "Full article text here", "languageCode": "not"}}', 'application/json')}

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {'id': '32', 'source': 'https://example.org', 'shortInfo': 'Climate change update', 'tags': ['not', 'not'], 'title': 'Climate change update', 'content': 'Full article text here', 'titleTranslation': {'content': 'Climate News', 'languageCode': 'not'}, 'textTranslation': {'content': 'Full article text here', 'languageCode': 'not'}}

steps.name: Then the response status code should be 400
And the response message should be Current user has no permission for this action
